attributes.action: The British People demand an emergency General Election NOW
attributes.additional_details:
This Government was elected by default, not through talent but because millions of people chose not to vote for the globalist sham that is LibLabCon.

The Tories let us down and were duly thrown out. This proven-FAILED Government gained power, according to the ONS, with a mere 20.3% of the possible vote. 4 in 5 did not vote for this anti-British omnishambles.

There is now a choice for change and We The People demand to correct the House with OUR choice of what constitutes public service.
attributes.background:
Launch an emergency General Election to give the public a say in the future of their country and culture.

We do not want yet another non-mandated 'leader' chosen behind closed doors.

We demand democracy, as best it can be.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
